title: Player Alarm
description: This project tells you entites or players (you can change mods) to know, who is in your render distance!
body:
Player Alarm - Never get caught off guard again!  

This client-side mod alerts you with a sound and chat message when players or entities enter your customizable detection radius (1-100 blocks).  

Features:  
• Instant audio & visual alerts when entities are detected  
• Toggle between "Players Only" or "All Entities" mode  
• Whitelist specific players to ignore friends  
• Adjustable detection radius (1-100 blocks)  
• Configuration saves automatically  
• Lightweight & client-side only  

Perfect for:  
✓ AFK farming safety  
✓ Base defense awareness  
✓ PvP situational awareness  
✓ Protecting yourself while building  

Commands: /playeralarm help
